Description
grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex
 
grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.downside
 
  • Classes in grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.downside used by grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex
    Class
    Description
    DownsideManagementConfig
    Downside management configuration: defines the loss trigger, chosen action (sell or average down), and the parameters for each variant.
  • Classes in grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.downside used by grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.downside
    Class
    Description
    AddStepRuleConfig
    Rule defining the interval at which additional buy orders are placed during averaging down.
    AverageDownConfig
    Variant B of downside management: average down by adding to the position at lower prices.
    DownsideTriggerConfig
    Trigger conditions for activating downside management: threshold, decision method, and optional indicator/statistical rules for hybrid decisions.
    IndicatorParams
    Shared parameter block for indicator and statistical rules.
    IndicatorRuleConfig
    A single indicator-based rule used in downside decision making (e.g.
    SellLossConfig
    Variant A of downside management: sell the position at a loss using a stop-loss mechanism.
    StatisticalRuleConfig
    A single statistical rule used in downside decision making (e.g. z-score below extreme threshold).
